testcase.name: test_regular_table_exists

failure.message: AssertionError: Regular table should have is_preorder=false assert None == False + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdb46eb80>('is_preorder') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdb46eb80> = {'code': '697DCAA5', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T17:38:15.975484+00:00', 'id': '827c810f-6da7-4d0b-9cbb-833bf4490d34', 'is_active': True, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preorders_complete_all.py:144: in test_regular_table_exists assert regular_table.get("is_preorder") == False, "Regular table should have is_preorder=false" E AssertionError: Regular table should have is_preorder=false E assert None == False E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdb46eb80>('is_preorder') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdb46eb80> = {'code': '697DCAA5', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T17:38:15.975484+00:00', 'id': '827c810f-6da7-4d0b-9cbb-833bf4490d34', 'is_active': True, ...}.get

failure.message: AssertionError: Regular table should have is_preorder=false assert None == False + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdafe7640>('is_preorder') + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdafe7640> = {'code': '697DCAA5', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T17:38:15.975484+00:00', 'id': '827c810f-6da7-4d0b-9cbb-833bf4490d34', 'is_active': True, ...}.get

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_preorders_complete_all.py:169: in test_public_menu_regular_table assert table.get("is_preorder") == False, "Regular table should have is_preorder=false" E AssertionError: Regular table should have is_preorder=false E assert None == False E + where None = <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdafe7640>('is_preorder') E + where <built-in method get of dict object at 0xfaabdafe7640> = {'code': '697DCAA5', 'created_at': '2026-01-26T17:38:15.975484+00:00', 'id': '827c810f-6da7-4d0b-9cbb-833bf4490d34', 'is_active': True, ...}.get
